name: consentful
description: Consentful — a white-label WordPress universal consent layer that gates all non-essential third-party tags behind visitor consent, adapts to the visitor's jurisdiction (Québec Loi 25 / GDPR / US opt-out), and keeps demonstrable proof of consent.
author: Tamarak (https://tamarak.dev)

scripts.build: npm run build:assets && npm run i18n
scripts.i18n: npm run i18n:pot && npm run i18n:po && npm run i18n:mo
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:php
scripts.package: npm run build && composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && wp package install wp-cli/dist-archive-command:^3 && wp dist-archive . ./consentful.zip --plugin-dirname=consentful --force && composer install
